context:
[25F] GI Issues for 2+ Years (connected to allergies and hormonal acne?)
I'm considering seeing a homeopathic doctor because my body has been acting up for a while now, and I think it may all be connected. Would appreciate any thoughts or feedback on what might be going on.

\[25, Female, 5'2", 125 lbs, South Asian, lives in America\]

\[current medications: Levothyroxine, Famotidine, Aller-tec. Taking seniors multivitamin and Vitamin D regularly\]

To lay it out as concisely as possible:

2016 - Went to dermatologist for both bad acne and weird red bumps that formed on my hands and feet every few weeks. Did multiple blood tests and no cause was found.

Nov 2016 - Diagnosed with Hashimoto's Disease, started taking Levothyroxine every morning since.

April 2019 - Went to the ER after throwing up 12-14 times within a few hours; may have been due to overeating the night before with lots of oily food, but food was digested by the time I threw up so I guessed it wasn't food poisoning. At the ER they tested my blood and urine and couldn't find a root cause. Started taking Omeprazole after this, continued taking for 6 months straight.

May 2019 - Skin started feeling very itchy and when I scratched, huge swollen welts formed where my nails were. Started taking allergy medicine since then; even now when I try to go off it, my skin goes back to being extremely itchy and sensitive. Went to an allergist in Aug 2019 who guessed it was histamine related to my GI issues and said to wait it out.

Sep 2019 - Did an endoscopy after a 12 hour fast but they found undigested food still in my stomach. Next week, did an endoscopy after a 24 hour fast and they couldn't find anything wrong. My allergist's hypothesis was H Pylori but this was ruled out. They suggested I have gastroparesis and to eat frequent, smaller meals which I still try to stick to.

In summary, my stomach has been acting up since May 2019 and I'm still taking anti-acid medicine (now Famotidine) to avoid getting bad acidity every night. I try to avoid fatty, spicy, and oily foods, as well as dairy and sugar (but I'm not perfect at this yet). My skin still needs allergy medicine to avoid becoming extremely itchy. My acne has gotten worse this year, concentrated around my cheeks and chin, which suggests hormonal acne (I'm not on birth control) and during my periods I sometimes have extremely painful cramps that make me feel faint. On top of these I generally feel drained and lethargic and have difficulty concentrating on a daily basis (I've wondered if I have ADHD). I did go to therapy from Jan - May 2019 which helped mentally but not physically.

I believe my skin, stomach, and mood could all be connected but I've been pinged around by health specialists all last year and need someone to just look at all my symptoms together as a whole. Any advice would be extremely appreciated!!
